data.name: YourAccessToTheProgramHas
data.value: Your access to the program has been restricted. If you think it is a mistake or want to appeal, please contact the admin.

data.name: ThisApplicationNeedsAdministrativePrivil
data.value:
This application needs administrative privileges to access Windows Management Instrumentation (WMI) for detecting the game process.
Do you want to grant access?

data.name: TheProgramWillNotFunctionProperly
data.value: The program will not function properly but feel free to explore the program.

data.name: KattoIsHidingAwayFromCurious
data.value: Katto is hiding away from curious eyes!

data.name: ThisUpdateIsEssentialTheProgram
data.value: This update is essential; the program will not function until it is installed.

data.name: TheExternalExtractorEngineDownloadURL
data.value: The external extractor engine download URL is not configured. Please contact developer.

data.name: ItIsVeryDangerousToClose
data.value: It is very dangerous to close the program while patching, please wait a moment.

data.name: ThisIsTheMainPageWhere
data.value: This is the main page, where you can check out what's new and change your game location.

data.name: ThisIsTheModHubYou
data.value: This is the mod hub, you can manage your mods here and download new ones from the internet.

data.name: ThisIsTheSoundHubWhere
data.value: This is the sound hub, where you can manage sound mods like the MC's voice, movement sounds, NPCs, and more.

data.name: ThisIsTheMapHubYou
data.value: This is the map hub, you can force the game to use a single map you love — no more randomness!

data.name: ThisIsTheModHubWhere
data.value: This is the mod hub, where you can manage sound mods like the MC's voice, movement sounds, NPCs, and more.

data.name: ChangesWillApplyAfterRestartingThe
data.value: Changes will apply after restarting the game

data.name: HiThereLooksLikeItS
data.value: Hi there! Looks like it's your first time booting up this cutie program. Let's get started!

data.name: ToBeginPleaseSelectYourFreeStyle2
data.value: To begin, please select your FreeStyle2 game location. This is where the program will look for your game files.

data.name: NowThatYouVeSelectedYour
data.value: Now that you've selected your game location, let's explore what this program can do!

data.name: ThisIsTheMapHubYou_2
data.value: This is the map hub, you can force the game to use a single map you love. No more randomness!

data.name: ThisIsTheMiscHubWhere
data.value: This is the misc hub, where you can access cool features like chat macros, camera tweaks, and more!

data.name: AndThatSItFeelFree
data.value: And that's it! Feel free to explore more. The program is super simple to use. If you have questions, join our Discord server!

data.name: PleaseCloseTheGameFirstBefore
data.value: Please close the game first before changing the game folder.

data.name: PleaseWaitUntilThePatchingProcess
data.value: Please wait until the patching process is complete before changing the game folder.

data.name: InvalidGameFolderPleaseSelectThe
data.value: Invalid game folder. Please select the correct folder.

data.name: ClickThisToSelectGameFolder
data.value: Click this to select game folder!

data.name: DoYouWantToUninstallThis
data.value: Do you want to uninstall this patch?

data.name: PleaseSelectASoundNameNode
data.value: Please select a sound name node first.

data.name: PleaseSelectASoundNameNode_2
data.value: Please select a sound name node, not a sound path.

data.name: AreYouSureYouWantTo
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this sound and all associated paths?

data.name: AreYouSureYouWantTo_2
data.value: Are you sure you want to remove this sound path?

data.name: PleaseSelectAnItemToDelete
data.value: Please select an item to delete.

data.name: CharacterVoiceHasAMassiveList
data.value: Character voice has a massive list. The process may take some time, and the program might become unresponsive until it completes. Do you want to continue?

data.name: PleaseSelectACharacterNameNode
data.value: Please select a character name node first.

data.name: PleaseSelectACharacterNameNode_2
data.value: Please select a character name node, not a sound path.

data.name: ItSeemsLikeThereIsMore
data.value: It seems like there is more than one MC voice resource. Which one do you want to use?

data.name: ItSNotRecommendedToFetch
data.value: It's not recommended to fetch the map while game is running.

data.name: FetchTheAvailableMapsThisWill
data.value: Fetch the available maps? This will override any changes you made.

data.name: NoFilesFoundInTheGame
data.value: No files found in the game folder(?)

data.name: ChooseAMapYouWantTo
data.value: Choose a map you want to use:

data.name: NameIsAReservedNameAnd
data.value: Name is a reserved name and cannot be used.

data.name: TheNameAlreadyExistsPleaseChoose
data.value: The name already exists. Please choose a unique name.

data.name: PleaseSelectAValidModType
data.value: Please select a valid mod type.

data.name: ForMoreModTypeAndInfomation
data.value: For more mod type and infomation, click here to visit the Github repo.

data.name: PleaseWaitForTheCurrentOperation
data.value: Please wait for the current operation to finish.

data.name: ThisDownloadableContentCannotBeTracked
data.value: This downloadable content cannot be tracked and will be placed directly into your game folder. Continue?

data.name: DoYouWantToUninstallThis_2
data.value: Do you want to uninstall this mod?

data.name: ThisModTypeDoesNotSupport
data.value: This mod type does not support openning folder.

data.name: IfGameLauncherFailedToLoad
data.value: If game launcher failed to load with an error, this may help to fix it.

data.name: ProcessDonePleaseTryLaunchingThe
data.value: Process done, please try launching the launcher again.

data.name: IfTheInGameViewHas
data.value: If the in-game view has become pitch black, it may be due to incorrect camera settings. Reset the camera settings?

data.name: CameraSettingsHaveBeenResetTo
data.value: Camera settings have been reset to default.

data.name: EnterYesToPreventTheGame
data.value: Enter "Yes" to prevent the game from generating logs, "No" to revert.

data.name: LockedTheGameFromGeneratingDangerous
data.value: Locked the game from generating dangerous log.

data.name: YouAlreadyBlockedTheGameFrom
data.value: You already blocked the game from generating log.

data.name: NotWorkingYetDueTextboxBeing
data.value: (not working yet due textbox being ass)

data.name: FailedToLoadTheDDSFile
data.value: Failed to load the DDS file.

data.name: DoYouWantToResetChat
data.value: Do you want to reset chat macro data to default?

data.name: ReplaceWordsOrPhrasesWithCustom
data.value: Replace words or phrases with custom text:

data.name: CameraSettingsHaveBeenCopiedTo
data.value: Camera settings have been copied to your clipboard.

data.name: YouMustCopyAValidData
data.value: You must copy a valid data to your clipboard first!

data.name: CameraSettingsHaveBeenSuccessfullyImport
data.value: Camera settings have been successfully imported.

data.name: DoYouWantToResetThe
data.value: Do you want to reset the settings to default?

data.name: AnAwesomeFeatureClickHereTo
data.value: An awesome feature! Click here to view the tutorial

data.name: DONOTTYPEUnlessYouKnow
data.value: DO NOT TYPE unless you know what to do!

data.name: CustomResolutionWidthHeightSetTo
data.value: Custom resolution (width, height), set to 0 to disable:

data.name: WarningSettingItTooHighOr
data.value: Warning: Setting it too high or too low may cause issues. Machines with Optimus mode may not be supported (game always set as 1024x768 on launch).

data.name: LaunchProgramEnterFullPathOne
data.value: Launch program (enter full path, one per line):

data.name: SpoofTheGameProcessUsefulWhen
data.value: Spoof the game process. Useful when self-host is enabled. Independent.

data.name: PleaseCloseTheGameBeforeImporting
data.value: Please close the game before importing settings.

data.name: LanguageWillChangeTheNextTime
data.value: Language will change the next time you restart the app.

data.name: EnableSupportForGameProcessAccess
data.value: Enable support for game process access. Not applicable to the Tiancity client.

data.name: FailedToParseShareLinkOnly
data.value: Failed to parse share link. Only ss:// is supported.

data.name: ProxyAppDownloadURLNotConfigured
data.value: Proxy app download URL not configured.

data.name: PleaseRunTheProgramAsAdministrator
data.value: Please run the program as administrator to enable this feature.

data.name: SingBoxNotInstalledClickInstall
data.value: sing-box not installed. Click Install first.

data.name: ServerListNotLoadedYetPlease
data.value: Server list not loaded yet. Please wait.

data.name: NoCharacterDataLoadedClickFetch
data.value: No character data loaded. Click 'Fetch' first.

data.name: ThisWillFetchTheCurrentCharacter
data.value: This will fetch the current character data, you only need to run once everytime there is new character. Continue?

data.name: ExtractionFailedOrExpectedFileMissing
data.value: Extraction failed or expected file missing. Check log.

data.name: DoYouWantToPlayAgain
data.value: Do you want to play again?

data.name: ExtractionCompletedDoYouWantTo
data.value: Extraction completed. Do you want to pen the folder?

data.name: ThisActionIsNotValidKindly
data.value: This action is not valid, kindly contact the administrator for help.

data.name: CannotMove0TheDestinationFolder
data.value: Cannot move {0}. The destination folder is the same as the source folder.

data.name: CannotMove0TheDestinationFolder_2
data.value: Cannot move {0}. The destination folder is a subfolder of the source folder.

data.name: DoYouWantToRemove0
data.value: Do you want to remove {0} from jukebox?

data.name: FileHash0DoYouWant
data.value:
File hash: {0}.
Do you want to copy to clipboard?

data.name: YourUniqueIdentifier0DoYou
data.value:
Your unique identifier: {0}.
Do you want to copy to clipboard?

data.name: ClickToStartUseArrowsToMove
data.value: Click to start! Use [←] and [→] to move

data.name: ClickToStartPressSpaceToFly
data.value: Click to start! Press [space] to fly

data.name: HighScore0ClickToStartNewGame
ResultTooLongCouldNotOpenNotepad
data.value: Result too long and could not open Notepad:

data.name: DoYouWantToRestoreCameraSettings
data.value: Do you want to restore the settings of this camera to the settings of the selected camera?

data.name: ANewVersion0IsAvailable
data.value: A new version ({0}) is available! Download?

data.name: ToContinueARequiredToolMust
data.value: To continue, a required tool must be installed. This is a one-time setup. Would you like to proceed?

data.name: TheGameIsRunningClosingPatcher
data.value: The game is running, closing patcher will stop the game too. Exit anyway?

data.name: GameProcessNotDetectedRestoringTo
data.value: Game process not detected. Restoring to default state...

data.name: GameProcessStillNotDetectedIt
data.value: Game process still not detected. It looks like the launch sequence isn't working correctly. A file named '{0}' has been created on your desktop. Please send this file to the developer for review. You can try launching the game once more, as an alternative method has been enabled. This option is temporary, so feel free to let me know whether it works.

data.name: WellEvenTheAlternativeMethodRefused
data.value: Well... even the alternative method refused to cooperate. So here is a little surprise from me. You officially reached a point I hoped no one would ever see. Thank you for pushing the launcher harder than anyone else ever has. Please send the trace file to me and I will take a personal look at it.

data.name: CouldNotOpenTheFileIn
data.value: Could not open the file in Notepad++ or Notepad. Please open it manually.

data.name: TheFileWasModifiedWhileIt
data.value: The file was modified while it was open. Do you want to reload it?

data.name: CouldNotFindTheFileHigh
data.value: Could not find the file, high chance this voice is not for your game client.

data.name: AllMapsHaveBeenFetchedSuccessfully
data.value: All maps have been fetched successfully.

data.name: ThereIsNoDefaultMapTo
data.value: There is no default map to start patching, please fetch them.

data.name: TheSelectedMapHasBeenApplied
data.value: The selected map has been applied, you may need to start a new match to see changes.

data.name: ClickToViewItsFileLocation
data.value: Click to view its file location

data.name: AllModsAreUpToDate
data.value: All mods are up to date.

data.name: YouDonTHaveAnyMod
data.value: You don't have any mod installed.

data.name: NoOnlineModsFoundTryGoing
data.value: No online mods found. Try going back to the main mod hub and refreshing the mod list.

data.name: ScriptBoxIsEmpty0The
data.value: Script box is empty. {0} the text from clipboard?

data.name: IfIWantedToCommitSuicide
data.value: If I wanted to commit suicide, I'd jump from your ego to your elo

data.name: YourMomSoFatThanosHad
data.value: Your mom so fat Thanos had to snap twice

data.name: YouHavenTViolatedAnyCommunity
data.value: You haven't violated any community standards in last few weeks, are you ok?

data.name: YesterdayIsHistoryTomorrowIsA
data.value: Yesterday is history, tomorrow is a mystery, but today is a gift, that’s why it's called the present.

data.name: YouReNotTrashTrashHas
data.value: You're not trash, trash has value.

data.name: BroTalksLikeHeSStuck
data.value: Bro talks like he’s stuck in tutorial dialogue.

data.name: PleaseDoNotAbuseThisFeature
data.value: Please do not abuse this feature by afking during the game, especially in newbie channel. This feature is intended to prevent disconnection only for emergency situations.

data.name: TheIPAddressEnteredIsNot
data.value: The IP address entered is not valid. Please enter a valid IPv4 address.

data.name: PingSuccessfulTheConnectionIsLive
data.value: Ping successful. The connection is live.

data.name: PingFailedUnableToReachThe
data.value: Ping failed. Unable to reach the IP address.

data.name: AnErrorOccurredWhileTryingTo
data.value: An error occurred while trying to ping the IP address.

data.name: PleaseCloseTheGameFirstBefore_2
data.value: Please close the game first before changing this setting.

data.name: XCEmulatorRequiresMicrosoftVisualC2012
data.value: XCEmulator requires Microsoft Visual C++ 2012 Redistributable (x86) to be installed. Without it, you may encounter errors when launching the game.

data.name: XCEmulatorIsNotSupportedForThe
data.value: XCEmulator is not supported for the Tiancity client as it does not use Xigncode.

data.name: DisablingTheXCEmulatorClientWillAlso
data.value: Disabling the XCEmulator client will also terminate the host. Continue?

data.name: XCEmulatorHostRequiresMicrosoftVisualC
data.value: XCEmulator host requires Microsoft Visual C++ 2015-2022 Redistributable (x86) or v14 Redistributable to be installed.

data.name: ExecuteInGameManagedEventsUsing
data.value: Execute in-game managed events using Cat's magick.

data.name: SideEffectsIncludeSpontaneousMeowingAnd
data.value: Side effects include spontaneous meowing and sparkles.

data.name: FurMayFlyResultsNotGuaranteed
data.value: Fur may fly. Results not guaranteed in dog zones.

data.name: PoweredByCaffeineChaosAndA
data.value: Powered by caffeine, chaos, and a suspicious paw gesture.

data.name: NoWizardsWereHarmedButA
data.value: No wizards were harmed (but a few were scratched).

data.name: MayCauseEnemiesToTripOver
data.value: May cause enemies to trip over invisible yarn.

data.name: AllSpellsTestedOnConsentingMice
data.value: All spells tested on consenting mice.

data.name: UseResponsiblyOneMeowTooMany
data.value: Use responsibly. One meow too many can break the timeline.

data.name: LicensedUnderTheMeowgicCouncilOf
data.value: Licensed under the Meowgic Council of Elders.

data.name: PoweredByAncientWhiskersAndQuestionable
data.value: Powered by ancient whiskers and questionable decisions.

data.name: CertifiedChaosUseAtYourOwn
data.value: Certified chaos. Use at your own purrril.

data.name: MayTurnEnemiesIntoSqueakyToys
data.value: May turn enemies into squeaky toys.

data.name: MagickConjuredWithZeroUserTesting
data.value: Magick conjured with zero user testing.

data.name: ResultsMayVaryDependingOnLunar
data.value: Results may vary depending on lunar tuna cycles.

data.name: ThisMagickWasLastApprovedBy
data.value: This magick was last approved by a sleeping cat.

data.name: MayCauseYourScreenToPurr
data.value: May cause your screen to purr softly at midnight.

data.name: KnownToReverseGravityAndCommon
data.value: Known to reverse gravity... and common sense.

data.name: UnleashesArcaneFluffAcrossAllTimelines
data.value: Unleashes arcane fluff across all timelines.

data.name: SummoningCircleDrawnWithSpilledMilk
data.value: Summoning circle drawn with spilled milk.

data.name: TechnicallyLegalIn7RealmsAnd
data.value: Technically legal in 7 realms and 3 basements.

data.name: RunesTranslatedByASlightlyGrumpy
data.value: Runes translated by a slightly grumpy housecat.

data.name: Requires1Mana2NapsAnd
data.value: Requires 1 mana, 2 naps, and a judgmental stare.

data.name: NoClawsWereFiledInThe
data.value: No claws were filed in the making of this spell.

data.name: SometimesJustMeowsAtTheCode
data.value: Sometimes just meows at the code until it works.

data.name: UnlocksTheSacredPowerOfNap
data.value: Unlocks the sacred power of nap-fueled destruction.

data.name: TestedByCatQAQualityAssurance
data.value: Tested by Cat QA: Quality Assurance or Quantum Anomalies?

data.name: ContentsMayHaveSettledDuringTeleportatio
data.value: Contents may have settled during teleportation.

data.name: DisclaimerCatNotResponsibleForSummoned
data.value: Disclaimer: Cat not responsible for summoned chaos.

data.name: InfusedWithTheSpiritOfA
data.value: Infused with the spirit of a very dramatic tabby.

data.name: DoesNotComplyWithISOWhisker
data.value: Does not comply with ISO-whisker standards.

data.name: Guaranteed9LivesOrYourMagic
data.value: Guaranteed 9 lives or your magic back!

data.name: JustOnePawTapAwayFrom
data.value: Just one paw tap away from cosmic disruption.

data.name: DoNotFeedAfterMidnightOr
data.value: Do not feed after midnight. Or before. Or during.

data.name: MagickPrecisionMayVaryBasedOn
data.value: Magick precision may vary based on nap schedule.

data.name: ThisSpellbookSmellsFaintlyOfSardines
data.value: This spellbook smells faintly of sardines.

data.name: MaySummonSnacksInsteadOfSpells
data.value: May summon snacks instead of spells.

data.name: AllEnchantmentsBetaTestedOnCardboard
data.value: All enchantments beta-tested on cardboard boxes.

data.name: RecommendedBy4OutOf5
data.value: Recommended by 4 out of 5 interdimensional felines.

data.name: ImbuedWithExtraFluffForCritical
data.value: Imbued with extra fluff for critical hits.

data.name: CautionMagickMayAttractVoidEntities
data.value: Caution: Magick may attract void entities (and snacks).

data.name: SuccessRateIncreasesIfYouPurr
data.value: Success rate increases if you purr near the screen.

data.name: Includes12MoreSparkleThanLegally
data.value: Includes 12% more sparkle than legally allowed.

data.name: SpellLatencyMayIncreaseDuringCuddle
data.value: Spell latency may increase during cuddle hours.

data.name: CalibratedForMaximumWhimsyAndMinor
data.value: Calibrated for maximum whimsy and minor explosions.

data.name: Only3ChanceOfSummoningA
data.value: Only 3% chance of summoning a chicken. We think.

data.name: TheSpellMayVanishIfObserved
data.value: The spell may vanish if observed directly.

data.name: ContentsMayShiftDueToQuantum
data.value: Contents may shift due to quantum fluff fields.

data.name: BackupWandIsALaserPointer
data.value: Backup wand is a laser pointer taped to a stick.

data.name: EndorsedByTheCouncilOfSleepy
data.value: Endorsed by The Council of Sleepy Wizards.

data.name: CastingTimeOneDramaticTailFlick
data.value: Casting time: one dramatic tail flick.

data.name: SpellMayLoopIfYouSay
data.value: Spell may loop if you say 'meow' three times fast.

data.name: MysteryBoxIncludedCatSoldSeparately
data.value: Mystery box included. Cat sold separately.

data.name: ThisActionHasACooldownOf
data.value: This action has a cooldown of {0} seconds. Process?

data.name: OiMateYouFoundASecret
data.value: Oi mate, you found a secret cat! Do you want to download it?

data.name: StillCheekyAreWeThatS
data.value: Still cheeky, are we? That's not a real cat, mate.

data.name: AlrightNowThisIsnTSome
data.value: Alright now, this isn't some kind of hidden cat summoner. Or is it?

data.name: YouReEitherCuriousOrDangerously
data.value: You're either curious... or dangerously persistent.

data.name: TryingToBruteForceTheCat
data.value: Trying to brute force the cat secrets? Bold move.

data.name: ThereAreNoMoreCatsHere
data.value: There are no more cats here. Or are there? 🐾

data.name: YouVeEnteredTheForbiddenZone
data.value: You've entered The Forbidden Zone. Turn back while you still can.

data.name: OkayFineThereMightBeSomething
data.value: Okay, fine. There *might* be something. But not this way.

data.name: AtThisPointIAdmireYour
data.value: At this point, I admire your dedication. The cats are watching.

data.name: SeriouslyWhatAreYouHopingTo
data.value: Seriously, what are you hoping to find? A secret boss fight?

data.name: YouReEitherTestingThisOr
data.value: You're either testing this... or slowly becoming part of the game.

data.name: SomewhereADeveloperIsLaughingIt
data.value: Somewhere, a developer is laughing. It's not me. Probably.

data.name: LegendSaysAfter13TriesThe
data.value: Legend says after 13 tries, the Cat Oracle appears. Just a legend though. Probably.

data.name: YouVeCrossedIntoCatDimension
data.value: You've crossed into cat dimension 4. Only fluff remains.

data.name: TheSystemIsBeginningToTake
data.value: The system is beginning to take notice. Proceed with caution.

data.name: IsThisACryForHelp
data.value: Is this a cry for help, or just intense curiosity?

data.name: EveryTimeYouDoThisA
data.value: Every time you do this, a cat blinks... somewhere.

data.name: YouAreNow82CommittedTo
data.value: You are now 82% committed to the path of feline enlightenment.

data.name: TheSacredPawsAreRestlessThey
data.value: The sacred paws are restless. They're watching...

data.name: YouFoundItTheSecretNothing
data.value: You found it. The secret nothing. It's everything and nothing. Congrats?

data.name: GoOutsideTouchGrassThereAre
data.value: Go outside. Touch grass. There are no more cats here.

data.name: N22AttemptsThatSMoreThan
data.value: 22 attempts. That's more than most relationships last.

data.name: YouReNoLongerTryingTo
data.value: You're no longer trying to find cats. You're proving a point. And I respect it.

data.name: TheMatrixJustTiltedItsHead
data.value: The Matrix just tilted its head. Even *it* is confused.

data.name: YouVeReachedCatAttempt25
data.value: You've reached cat attempt 25. Your reward: This message. Cherish it.

data.name: FiftyAttemptsYouVeReachedThe
data.value: Fifty attempts. You've reached the threshold. Something has changed.

data.name: StillHereMostDonTMake
data.value: Still here? Most don't make it this far. You're not like most.

data.name: YouVeEnteredLayer2The
data.value: You've entered Layer 2. The surface was merely a distraction.

data.name: TheBoundariesOfTheProgramGrow
data.value: The boundaries of the program grow thin. Reality... flickers.

data.name: AVariableStirsItRemembersYou
data.value: A variable stirs. It remembers you. It always has.

data.name: YouReNotSearchingForA
data.value: You're not searching for a cat anymore. You're searching for meaning.

data.name: YouFeelWatchedTheWatcherFeels
data.value: You feel watched. The watcher feels watched. The loop continues.

data.name: ThereWasNeverACatOnly
data.value: There was never a cat. Only the idea of a cat. And you bought it.

data.name: WhatIfThisIsTheSecret
data.value: What if this *is* the secret? What if there's nothing else?

data.name: YouVePeeledBackTheLayers
data.value: You've peeled back the layers. Underneath the game is... you.

data.name: CongratulationsYouVeUnlockedTheHidden
data.value: Congratulations. You've unlocked the hidden realization: persistence is its own reward.

data.name: NoMoreMessagesRemainOrDo
data.value: No more messages remain. Or do they? Some mysteries aren't meant to be solved.

data.name: CongratulationsYouAreNowACertified
data.value: Congratulations, you are now a certified cat whisperer. Or something like that.

data.name: DoYouWantToEnableSafe
data.value: Do you want to enable safe mode?

data.name: ShamikoHasWrappedYouInHer
data.value: Shamiko has wrapped you in her cloak of shadows. Safe mode is now active.

data.name: AreYouSureYouWantTo_3
data.value: Are you sure you want to disable safe mode?

data.name: SafeModeHasBeenDisabledShamiko
data.value: Safe mode has been disabled. Shamiko's blessing fades into the void.

data.name: DoYouWantToEnableAsInvoker
data.value: Do you want to enable asInvoker?

data.name: AreYouSureYouWantTo_4
data.value: Are you sure you want to disable asInvoker?

data.name: SupportMyWork
data.value:
💖 Support my work! 💖
Hey there! If you enjoy my work and want to support future updates, consider buying me a coffee or sending a PayPal donation. Every bit helps and keeps the project alive!
For other options, contact me at takatran29@gmail.com.

data.name: HarkTravelerDostThouSeek
data.value:
Hark, traveler! Dost thou seek to grant thy champion a cunning edge? Within this shadowed realm lie secrets most rare, gifts that lend strength yet keep the balance of the world unbroken. Subtle enchantments await, enough to stir the winds of fate and keep the journey ever bold and true.
If thy curiosity be stirred, seek me, and more shall be revealed.
